enabled.label: Enable Trakt
enabled.description: Master on/off for Trakt scrobbling and sync. Optional; default off.

username.label: Trakt Username
username.description: Display-only: the Trakt account Phlix is linked to (set during authorization).

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Obtained automatically when you authorize Phlix with Trakt — you do not enter this by hand. Create an API app only if you self-host credentials.

refresh_token.label: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: Set automatically during authorization; used to renew the access token. Not entered by hand.

expires_at.label: Token Expiry
expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when the access token expires. Managed automatically.

sync_enabled.label: Enable library sync
sync_enabled.description: Sync watched state with Trakt. Optional; default on.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to sync with Trakt. Optional; default 30.

scrobble_enabled.label: Enable scrobbling
scrobble_enabled.description: Report play/pause/stop to Trakt as you watch. Optional; default on.
